description: VCF-derived aggregate evidence sidecar for Q7 existence audit. One row per (candidate × sample × bp_side × caller × support_type). SV callers (DELLY / Manta) expose per-sample alt-read COUNTS via FORMAT fields (DV, RV, PR, SR) but do not export read names in the standard filter+regenotype workflow. This sidecar preserves those counts for join against the BAM ledger (evidence_reads_bam.tsv.gz) by (candidate_id, sample_id, bp_side). Produced by STEP_03_per_read_evidence.py.
question: Q7

columns.name: bp_side
columns.description: Which candidate breakpoint the VCF record sits near.

columns.name: support_type
columns.description: DV=DELLY discordant pairs; RV=DELLY split reads; PR_alt=Manta alt paired-read count; SR_alt=Manta alt split-read count.

columns.name: n_reads
columns.description: Count reported by the caller for this sample at this record.

columns.name: record_pos
columns.description: POS of the VCF record that supplied this count.
